definition: A public HedgAI holder wall. It ranks token ownership and public wallet posture, not audited profit.

featured_wallets.control: No token balance grants Trinity control.
featured_wallets.profile: Founder-level holder signal. Owner-only controls remain separate from token holding.

scenario_read.defensive: Protect reserve and avoid over-concentrating the signal leg.
scenario_read.neutral: Maintain the triangle: HedgAI signal, SOL fuel, stable reserve.
scenario_read.offensive: Add to signal only from excess capital after reserves remain healthy.

featured_wallets.control: No token balance grants Trinity control.
featured_wallets.profile: Early token-holder signal from a public wallet.

scenario_read.defensive: Build SOL fuel and stable reserve before increasing signal exposure.
scenario_read.neutral: Hold current signal and wait for reserve support.
scenario_read.offensive: Only increase signal after SOL/stable support improves.
